## Definition of Done
A testing/QA task is done when **all** of the following are satisfied:
 
- [ ] Test plan is created and approved
- [ ] All test cases are implemented
- [ ] Tests are running and passing
- [ ] Coverage target is met
- [ ] Test code follows the project's style guide
- [ ] Tests are properly documented with comments
- [ ] Edge cases and error scenarios are covered
- [ ] Test data/fixtures are properly managed
- [ ] Tests are not flaky (no intermittent failures)
- [ ] Performance of tests is acceptable
- [ ] Test results are documented
- [ ] Code review is complete and approved
- [ ] Tests are integrated into CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Branch is merged to `main`
---
